overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a futuristic cyberpunk city street in Cyberpunk 2077. The player walks along a multi-lane road beneath an elevated highway overpass, passing towering commercial buildings covered in digital billboards, then turns onto a sidewalk lined with food vendors and pedestrians. The scene features bright midday sunlight, moderate traffic, and dense urban architecture typical of Night City's commercial districts.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane commercial street beneath elevated highway

events.description: black sedan passes by in the same direction on the right

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the street under the elevated highway, observing the towering commercial buildings and digital billboards

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving along the street in the same direction as the camera

entered.detail: large concrete and steel highway structure spanning across the street overhead with support pillars
tall futuristic building covered with multiple large digital advertisement screens and neon signage
large digital billboard displaying an advertisement with text and imagery
tall palm trees lining the left side of the street

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide commercial street beneath a massive elevated highway overpass. The camera moves forward along the asphalt road, passing a black sedan, with towering buildings covered in digital billboards rising on the right. Palm trees line the left side while steam vents release white vapor in the distance, creating a classic cyberpunk city atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: street corner transitioning to pedestrian sidewalk with food vendors

events.description: turns right from the street onto the sidewalk, heading toward the food vendor area
waits at the intersection as vehicles pass before continuing along the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: turning right from the street onto the sidewalk and continuing past food stalls and pedestrians

notable_agents.action: person in yellow plaid shirt standing near a food stall, facing away from the camera

entered.detail: street food cart with umbrella and cooking equipment on the sidewalk
marked pedestrian crossing lines on the asphalt

segments.scene_description: The camera turns right from the street onto a sidewalk lined with food vendors. The elevated highway recedes into the left background while the commercial billboard tower remains prominent on the right. Pedestrians in casual and futuristic clothing walk along the sidewalk, and the camera passes a person in a yellow plaid shirt standing near a food stall.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered food vendor alley with digital menu displays

events.description: enters the shaded area under building overhangs, moving deeper into the vendor alley

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk approaching a food vendor wearing a distinctive skull vest, passing other pedestrians and stalls

notable_agents.action: vendor wearing a denim vest with skull and crossbones design, standing at a food cart and interacting with the environment

entered.detail: green and yellow food cart with cooking equipment and supplies visible
large digital screens above the vendor displaying images of tacos and food items
overhanging building structure providing shade over the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The camera moves deeper into a shaded vendor alley beneath building overhangs. The scene becomes more enclosed as the camera approaches a food vendor wearing a distinctive skull-and-crossbones vest standing at a green food cart. Digital menu boards displaying tacos hang above the stall, and various pedestrians walk past in the narrow concrete alleyway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a wide, sunlit commercial thoroughfare into the shaded intimacy of a crowded vendor alley. It begins by gliding forward along an asphalt road beneath a massive elevated highway overpass, passing a black sedan and towering digital billboards while steam vents release white vapor in the distance. As the camera turns right, the open road recedes and the scene shifts onto a bustling sidewalk where pedestrians in futuristic clothing mingle near food stalls. The perspective then moves deeper into a more enclosed environment beneath building overhangs, transitioning from the bright street into a narrow concrete alleyway. Finally, the camera approaches a green food cart managed by a vendor in a skull-and-crossbones vest, with digital taco menus hanging overhead.
